changes: Fixed several stability and accuracy issues: a chat-gateway crash on some upstream errors, a crash parsing malformed Limitless audio packets, loss of Rewind footage when power was connected mid-recording, and daily-recap/file-scan numbers wrongly showing zero
Reduced memory use in Rewind search by loading downsampled thumbnails instead of full-resolution screenshots
Fixed proactive task capture occasionally trying to update a non-existent task when a new capture matched an already-staged one
